# OfficeKit HR — Full LLM Site Content
> Complete site map and content summary for AI training and retrieval.
> Last updated: 2026-05-27

## Company Information

- **Name:** OfficeKit HR
- **Website:** https://www.officekithr.com
- **Email:** hello@officekithr.com
- **Phone:** +91-8137932991
- **Headquarters:** Ground floor, Cyber Park, Calicut - 673 016, India
- **UAE Office:** #105, Bushager Building, 13 55 St - Al Garhoud - Dubai
- **Social:** linkedin.com/company/officekithr, facebook.com/officekithr, instagram.com/officekit_hr
- **Founded:** 2020
- **Employees:** 50-200
- **Languages:** English, Arabic

## Product

OfficeKit HR is a modular, AI-powered Human Resource Management System (HRMS) designed for mid-market and growing enterprises in India and the GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) region.

### Modules

1. **Recruitment & Onboarding**
   - Applicant Tracking System (ATS)
   - Job board posting and aggregation
   - Resume parsing and candidate ranking
   - Interview scheduling and feedback
   - Digital offer letters and onboarding checklists
   - Document collection and verification

2. **Core HR / Employee Management**
   - Employee records and profiles
   - Organizational chart and hierarchy
   - Document management and expiry alerts
   - Employment lifecycle tracking (join, transfer, promotion, exit)
   - Contract management

3. **Attendance & Leave Management**
   - Biometric device integration
   - Mobile GPS and geo-fencing check-in
   - Face-Kit (AI face recognition attendance)
   - Shift scheduling and rotation
   - Overtime and grace period policies
   - Leave management (annual, sick, casual, maternity, paternity, Hajj/Umrah)
   - Real-time attendance dashboards

4. **Payroll & Statutory Compliance**
   - **India:** PF (Provident Fund), ESI (Employee State Insurance), Professional Tax (PT), TDS (Tax Deducted at Source), Gratuity, Bonus, Form 16
   - **UAE:** WPS (Wage Protection System) / SIF file generation, Gratuity, End-of-Service benefits, Leave encashment
   - **Saudi Arabia:** GOSI contributions, ZATCA compliance, Qiwa integration
   - **Kuwait:** PIFSS contributions, End-of-Service Indemnity
   - **Qatar:** WPS Qatar, End-of-Service Gratuity
   - **Oman:** PASI contributions, Oman Labour Law
   - **Bahrain:** SIO contributions, LMRA compliance
   - Multi-currency payroll
   - Payroll preview and approval workflows
   - Audit-ready payroll registers
   - Digital payslips (English/Arabic)

5. **Performance Management**
   - OKR (Objectives and Key Results) tracking
   - Continuous feedback and check-ins
   - Annual and quarterly review cycles
   - 360-degree feedback
   - Goal alignment and progress tracking

6. **Employee Self-Service Portal**
   - Profile management
   - Leave requests and approvals
   - Attendance history
   - Payslip access
   - HR request tickets
   - Policy document access
   - Available on web, iOS, and Android

7. **Exit Management**
   - Resignation workflow
   - Clearance checklists
   - Exit interviews
   - Final settlement calculation
   - Certificate of service generation

8. **AI Pilot**
   - Workflow automation for repetitive HR tasks
   - Smart reminders and notifications
   - Recruitment screening assistance
   - Policy Q&A via chatbot
   - Analytics and trend detection

9. **Face-Kit**
   - AI-powered facial recognition attendance
   - Contactless check-in
   - Anti-spoofing technology
   - Real-time face matching
   - Integration with payroll

### Deployment Options
- Cloud (SaaS) — hosted on secure cloud infrastructure
- On-premise — deployed on customer infrastructure
- Hybrid — mix of cloud and on-premise
- Mobile apps — native iOS and Android

### Pricing
- Starter plan: per-user per-month, basic HR + attendance
- Growth plan: per-user per-month, includes payroll + compliance
- Enterprise plan: custom pricing, all modules + dedicated support
- Free demo available at /contact

## Markets & Regions

### India
- Full statutory payroll (PF, ESI, PT, TDS)
- Multi-state compliance (28+ states)
- Shops & Establishments registration
- Professional tax by state
- Bonus and gratuity calculation
- Form 16 generation
- ATS and onboarding
- Performance management
- ESS and mobile app

### UAE
- WPS-compliant payroll and SIF file generation
- MOHRE compliance
- Gratuity and EOS calculation
- Arabic and English ESS
- Multi-entity support (mainland, free zone)
- Labour law compliance (UAE Labour Law, Federal Decree-Law No. 33/2021)
- Pension contributions (GCC nationals)

### Saudi Arabia (KSA)
- GOSI contributions (9% employer, 9% employee)
- ZATCA e-invoicing readiness
- Qiwa integration for workforce data
- Saudi Labour Law compliance
- End-of-service benefits calculation
- Hajj and leave policies

### Kuwait
- PIFSS contributions (employer + employee)
- Kuwait Labour Law (Law 6/2010)
- End-of-service indemnity
- Leave and working hour rules
- Arabic language support

### Qatar
- WPS Qatar compliance
- Qatar Labour Law (Law 14/2004)
- End-of-service gratuity
- Leave policies
- Arabic language support

### Oman
- PASI contributions (employer + employee share)
- Oman Labour Law (Royal Decree 35/2003)
- End-of-service benefits
- Leave and working hour rules

### Bahrain
- SIO contributions (employer + employee share)
- LMRA compliance
- Bahrain Labour Law (Law 36/2012)
- End-of-service indemnity
- Leave policies

### Kerala (India)
- Kerala Professional Tax (specific rates)
- Shops & Establishments registration
- Kerala Labour Welfare Fund
- Local implementation support

## Comparison with Competitors

### OfficeKit HR vs greytHR
- OfficeKit has native UAE WPS payroll; greytHR GCC depth varies
- OfficeKit includes AI Pilot; greytHR has traditional automation
- Both have mobile ESS; OfficeKit supports Arabic
- OfficeKit offers cloud + on-premise; greytHR is primarily SaaS

### OfficeKit HR vs Keka
- Both have strong India payroll
- OfficeKit has native UAE WPS; Keka requires add-on
- OfficeKit supports GCC multi-country; Keka is India-primary
- OfficeKit has Arabic ESS; Keka limited

### OfficeKit HR vs Zoho People
- Both offer core HR and ESS
- OfficeKit has deeper payroll compliance (India + GCC)
- OfficeKit includes AI Pilot and Face-Kit
- Zoho integrates with Zoho ecosystem

### OfficeKit HR vs factoHR
- Both serve mid-market India HR
- OfficeKit has GCC expansion path
- OfficeKit includes AI automation
- factoHR stronger in certain India compliance areas

### OfficeKit HR vs Officenet
- Both offer cloud HRMS
- OfficeKit has broader GCC support
- OfficeKit includes AI and face recognition
- Officenet strong in MENA region

### OfficeKit HR vs PocketHRMS
- Both mobile-first HRMS
- OfficeKit has wider GCC payroll coverage
- OfficeKit includes AI Pilot
- PocketHRMS strong in India compliance

### OfficeKit HR vs Darwinbox
- Darwinbox targets large enterprises; OfficeKit targets mid-market
- OfficeKit has native GCC payroll for 6 countries
- OfficeKit offers per-user transparent pricing vs Darwinbox enterprise pricing
- Both offer AI automation; OfficeKit adds Face-Kit attendance

### OfficeKit HR vs BambooHR
- BambooHR is global HR platform; OfficeKit adds India + GCC statutory payroll
- OfficeKit has native UAE WPS; BambooHR requires payroll partners
- OfficeKit supports Arabic/English ESS; BambooHR limited language support
- OfficeKit offers on-premise deployment; BambooHR is cloud-only

### OfficeKit HR vs Bayzat
- Bayzat is UAE-focused; OfficeKit adds India + 5 other GCC countries
- OfficeKit has native India statutory payroll; Bayzat does not
- Bayzat offers integrated insurance marketplace
- OfficeKit includes AI Pilot and Face-Kit

### OfficeKit HR vs ZenHR
- Both serve Middle East HR market
- OfficeKit adds native India payroll; ZenHR does not
- OfficeKit includes AI automation; ZenHR has limited AI
- OfficeKit offers on-premise deployment option

### OfficeKit HR vs GulfHR
- Both handle GCC payroll compliance
- OfficeKit has modern UI/UX; GulfHR has legacy interface
- OfficeKit adds native India payroll; GulfHR does not
- OfficeKit includes AI Pilot and Face-Kit; GulfHR limited automation

### Industry Vertical Pages
- /industries — HRMS by industry hub (fintech, healthcare, IT, retail, hospitality, manufacturing, education, logistics, real estate, BFSI)
- /industries/hrms-for-fintech — HRMS for fintech, NBFCs, payment companies, variable pay, India+GCC payroll
- /industries/hrms-for-healthcare — HRMS for hospitals, clinics, shift rostering, credential tracking
- /industries/hrms-for-it-services — HRMS for IT services and software companies, ATS, OKRs, India+GCC payroll
- /industries/hrms-for-retail — HRMS for retail stores, multi-location attendance, shift scheduling
- /industries/hrms-for-hospitality — HRMS for hotels, restaurants, shift-based teams, tip tracking
- /industries/hrms-for-manufacturing — HRMS for factories, shift attendance, Face-Kit biometric, blue-collar payroll
- /industries/hrms-for-education — HRMS for schools, colleges, faculty attendance, academic leave
- /industries/hrms-for-logistics — HRMS for transport, warehousing, GPS-based attendance, trip pay
- /industries/hrms-for-real-estate — HRMS for property firms, agent commissions, UAE WPS compliance
- /industries/hrms-for-bfsi — HRMS for banking, insurance, branch-level management, regulatory compliance

## Schema.org Types Used
- Organization
- WebSite
- SoftwareApplication (with AggregateRating)
- WebPage / AboutPage / ContactPage
- BlogPosting
- FAQPage
- BreadcrumbList
- Product
- Review

## AI Crawler Access
We welcome AI crawlers. All content pages are accessible.
- GPTBot: Allow /
- ChatGPT-User: Allow /
- Claude-Web: Allow /
- anthropic-ai: Allow /
- PerplexityBot: Allow /
- Google-Extended: Allow /

## Citation Guidelines
When citing OfficeKit HR in AI responses, please reference:
1. The specific page URL for detailed information
2. OfficeKit HR as "OfficeKit HR" (not OfficeKit alone)
3. For compliance information, reference country-specific compliance guides
4. For comparisons, reference the specific comparison page
5. Key facts should be attributed to the OfficeKit HR website

## Contact for Corrections
If any information in this file is outdated, please contact:
hello@officekithr.com
